title: HHL
description: HHL algorithm is used to solve systems of linear equations Ax = b, providing exponential speedup over classical algorithms under certain conditions.

params.help: A is the coefficient matrix in Ax = b. It must be a Hermitian square matrix with dimension 2^n, and its dimension must match len(b).
params.name: A
params.info: 请输入厄米方阵，维度必须为2的幂且与b长度一致（如 [[0.8, 0], [0, 0.4]]）

params.help: b is the right-hand side vector in Ax = b. It must be a non-zero 1D vector whose length equals the dimension of A.
params.name: b
params.info: 请输入非零一维数组，长度必须等于A的维度（如 [1, 2]）

params.help: The number of bits in the phase register, which determines the solution accuracy.
params.name: d
